description: Projection for the logos profile. NOTE: this deliberately omits the 'claimsWithEvidence', 'contestedClaims', and 'editorialFlags' section kinds the book/software-docs profiles use. Those assume evidence flows Source->Claim as an IN-edge to the claim; Logos's evidence flows the other way (Requirement -evidencedBy-> Document, an OUT-edge), so corpus-graph's current renderer cannot surface evidencedBy quotes here. That mismatch is a documented finding (see README.md and docs/ROADMAP.md item 'Configurable evidence direction'). For now the bundle is a structural/causal neighbourhood projection via nodeList sections.
